response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience on Windows platforms or direct exposure to capital markets/fixed income domains, despite claiming C++ in a bachelor’s thesis context; their professional work is overwhelmingly in TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile stacks, with no evidence of SQL Server/Oracle usage or financial systems development.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Extensive DevOps and CI/CD exposure across multiple environments
concerns: No verifiable professional C++ experience on Windows required for the role
Zero evidence of fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain knowledge
SQL experience listed generically without SQL Server/Oracle project context
